visual_evidence: Whiteboard-style boxes, arrows, sticky notes, pen, and purple crossed drawing-tools logo strongly signal a sketch/diagramming tool.
semantic_comment: Identifiable mainly from the Excalidraw-like logo plus hand-drawn workflow semantics.

visual_evidence: Large autonomous coding workspace with task cards, code review panels, progress flow, and robot assistant moving work through screens.
semantic_comment: Semantically ambiguous among coding agents, but the end-to-end autonomous software-engineer workflow fits Devin best.

visual_evidence: Explicit GitHub Copilot wordmark and GitHub logo, with code suggestions and repository workflow cards.
semantic_comment: Only minimally ambiguous because the logo names the product.

visual_evidence: Explicit Perplexity wordmark, search/query boxes, cited-source style cards, and answer flow from question to results.
semantic_comment: Logo-driven identification; without it, could resemble Genspark-style research aggregation.

visual_evidence: Large OpenAI wordmark, chat assistant interface, code/data/tool cards, and general assistant workflow.
semantic_comment: OpenAI logo makes it clear, but semantic content overlaps with Codex because code panels are present.

visual_evidence: Explicit Claude wordmark and orange Claude mark, document-heavy reasoning and analysis layout.
semantic_comment: Logo-driven Claude identification; document collaboration could otherwise resemble Claude Cowork.

visual_evidence: IDE-centered coding surface with dark editor, file/search panels, terminal/database/package icons, and Cursor-like black clustered logo.
semantic_comment: Mostly logo-driven; semantically overlaps with other AI coding environments.

visual_evidence: Sparkle-in-black-circle logo, multi-source research collection, generated dashboards, reports, charts, and synthesis panels.
semantic_comment: Research-answer workflow is close to Perplexity, but the sparkle logo and broader generated workspace fit Genspark.

visual_evidence: Central assistant mediates between user messages, documents, task cards, and a team collaboration scene.
semantic_comment: No strong logo; best read as collaborative Claude coworking rather than base Claude.

visual_evidence: Multicolor Gemini sparkle logo with assistant hub connected to Docs, Sheets, chat, mobile, and code surfaces.
semantic_comment: Gemini logo is decisive; lack of pricing tiers separates it from the Gemini pricing-plan entry.

visual_evidence: Coding workflow with planner, terminal/code panel, document changes, verification shield, and robot coding assistant beside the IDE.
semantic_comment: Ambiguous coding-agent image; stronger fit for Claude Code because of terminal-centric code assistance rather than broad autonomous project execution.

visual_evidence: Gemini sparkle logo plus three pricing/plan columns, gauges, tags, feature checklists, and user/group bubbles.
semantic_comment: Clearly the Gemini pricing-plan concept rather than general Gemini.

visual_evidence: Google/Vertex-style multicolor mark, model/data pipeline, vector nodes, cube, metrics, and cloud AI platform dashboard.
semantic_comment: Identifiable by Google cloud AI platform visuals and logo; semantically could touch Gemini because both are Google AI.

visual_evidence: Dense agentic coding workspace with code editor, project cards, tests, shields, docs, robot assistant, and delivery/status dashboards.
semantic_comment: No obvious product logo, so this is semantic; broad code-agent orchestration fits Codex slightly better than Devin or Claude Code.
